title: “I Know I Shouldn’t Use It But I Still Do”: The Outward Shunning and Continued Use of AI
description: We’ve all heard every man and his dog ask their good mate “Chat” for help with whatever problem they come up against recently. So you have a weird rash that won’t go away? Ask Chat. What should I eat for lunch? Ask Chat. Have a super long assignment you can’t be bothered to write? Ask Chat. Any task that requires even a fraction of effort or more than one Google search? Ask Chat! For those unaccustomed, or anyone who has been living under a rock, by “Chat” I am referring to ChatGPT, the most widely used AI chatbot, which is, to some, the best thing... Read more »

title: Executives and professors deploy AI versions of themselves to handle meetings and answer questions
description: Some executives are training AI chatbots on their own writing and interviews, then letting employees consult the bot instead of them. Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire built his using Claude and deployed it to 1,000 staff.

title: Dr. Nutan Naidu Awarded Doctorate and Full Professorship in Organisational Neuroscience & AI Ethics
description: First Indian to Receive the Prestigious Dual Academic Honour

title: Deepfakes emerge from CJP protest in Delhi; police working to identify AI videos
description: After protests by the social media fame Cockroach Janata Party (CJP), Delhi Police have reported and identified a surge of AI-generated content circulating online with various misleading claims. The most recent example was a video alleging the theft of 93 mobile phones from the protest site on Sunday. Following its circulation on social media, Delhi [...]

title: Argan: Still Fueling America's AI
description: Argan is a premier beneficiary of surging U.S. power infrastructure demand driven by AI, data centers, and electrification. Learn why AGX stock is a buy.
